## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (both compiled **and** interpreted paths for semantic changes)

- [ ] Golden-file fixtures updated deliberately if observable behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/schema/rule-schema.json` + validator + README updated together for schema changes
- [ ] XML docs on new/changed public members
